label: AppleScript • scripted multi-value return
query: Report both the current output volume and the frontmost application name.
notes: Model-free CI anchor for a structured multi-value return: one read script that `return`s two values in a single string. The canned executor stands in for the OS and returns a combined value; the loop coerces it and both values survive into the captured result. Proves the read path carries more than one value. No tokens.

scriptedCalls: {"script":"return (output volume of (get volume settings)) & \" / \" & (name of first process whose frontmost is true)"}
